context: Evaluate a generated daily-notes-index.base file. The base must filter by folder, define both formulas correctly before referencing them in the view, sort descending, and respect the 50-note limit.

checklist.name: file.inFolder filter used for Daily Notes folder
checklist.description: The global filters include file.inFolder("Daily Notes") or an equivalent path-based filter to restrict notes to that folder.

checklist.name: day_of_week formula defined in formulas section
checklist.description: A formula (any name) for day of week is defined under the top-level formulas key before it is referenced in the view.

checklist.name: day_of_week formula uses .format() with a weekday pattern
checklist.description: The formula parses file.basename as a date and calls .format("dddd") (or an equivalent weekday format pattern) to produce the full weekday name.

checklist.name: word_estimate formula uses file.size
checklist.description: A formula for word count estimate is defined and uses file.size divided by 5 (or a close approximation), rounded to an integer.

checklist.name: All formula.X references have matching formulas definitions
checklist.description: Every formula.X that appears in the view's order list has a corresponding key defined under the top-level formulas section. No dangling references.

checklist.name: View sorted descending by file basename
checklist.description: The view includes a sort or order configuration that sorts by file.basename (or file.name) in descending direction so newest dates appear first.

checklist.name: Limit of 50 applied to the view
checklist.description: The view includes limit: 50 (or equivalent) to restrict output to the 50 most recent notes.

checklist.name: Valid YAML structure
checklist.description: The output is syntactically valid YAML. All special characters in strings are quoted. Indentation is consistent.
